auth.secure_access: Shiga cikin aminci zuwa dashboard dinka
auth.register_subtitle: Shiga Germinos ka fara tafiyar ajiyarka

settings.title: Saitunan Asusun
settings.subtitle: Keɓance uzoefu na Germinos
settings.currency_note: Canza wannan yana shafar yadda ake nuna kididdigar ku. Gudunmawar rukuni sun kasance a cikin kuɗin rukunin.
settings.data_persistence_desc: Abubuwan zaɓin ku ana sync cikin aminci.
settings.growth_insight_desc_part1: Adana kudin ku na daya ya kai
settings.growth_insight_desc_part2: na yawan kudin ku. Yi la'akari da tura kudin da suka wuce kima zuwa **Global ETFs** don samun ingantaccen girma na dogon lokaci.
settings.savings_deep_dive_desc: Sarrafa manufofin ku da kalubale masu aiki.
settings.portfolio_analytics_desc: Bincika ayyukan kadarori da basirar mai ba da shawara na AI.

savings.opt_out_confirm:
Shin kun tabbata kuna son FITARE daga adana kudi na rukunin? 

Za ku ci gaba da adana kudi na kanku, amma ba za ku shiga cikin raba kudaden rukunin ku ba.
savings.opt_in_confirm:
Koma shiga Adana Kudi na Rukuni? 

Za ku sake shiga cikin raba kudaden rukunin.
savings.personal_savings_subtitle: Bincika da girma manufofin kudin ku tare da rukunonin ku.
savings.no_goals_desc: Fara tafiyar ku yau ta hanyar samar da manufar adana kudi na kanku na farko.
savings.create_first_goal: + Samar da manufar ku ta farko

investments.unlock_title: Bude Saka Jari Na Kananan Kudi
investments.unlock_desc: Fara girma dukiyar ku tare da kananan hannun jari da asusun da AI ke sarrafa su. Robo-Advisor din mu yana saukaka saka jari.
investments.wealth_growth_desc: Samu kasuwannin duniya tare da kasa da {{currency}} 100.
investments.auto_investing_desc: Saita shi ka manta dashi tare da ajiya na akai-akai.
investments.robo_advisor_desc: Rabawa cikin basira dangane da hadarin ku.
investments.robo_rebalancing_desc: Dangane da hadarin ku na {{risk}}, muna da sabbin shawarwari don inganta ribar ku.
investments.no_holdings: Babu kadarori tukunna. Fara ta hanyar kunna saka jari na farko.

admin.record_contribution_desc: Ƙara sabon rikodin biyan kuɗi zuwa babban littafi.
admin.record_payout_desc: Raba kuɗi ga mamba daga asusun rukuni.
admin.send_notification_desc: Aika sako ga dukkan mambobin rukuni masu aiki.
admin.notification_title_placeholder: misali: Raba kudi na gaba gobe
admin.group_fee_desc: Wannan kudin yana tafiya kai tsaye ga gudanarwar rukuni.
admin.enable_micro_investments: Kunna Saka Jari na Kananan Kudi
admin.micro_investments_desc: Bada damar mambobi su sake saka jari na dukkan adana kudin su a kasuwa.
admin.edit_member_desc: Sabunta cikakken bayanin mamba da yanayin shiga rukuni.
admin.include_admin_as_member_desc: Kunna ne kawai idan kai ma kana son bayar da gudunmawa a matsayin mai shiga.

dashboard.title: Bayanin Rukuni
dashboard.total_expected: Jimillar Abin da ake Kyautata Zato
dashboard.no_transactions: Ba a sami tarihin wannan lokacin ba.
dashboard.my_micro_savings: Asusun Adana Kudi na na Kananan Kudi

sysadmin.platform_desc: Kididdigar matakin sama da ma'aunin lafiya don tsarin Germinos SaaS.
sysadmin.total_users: Jimillar Masu Amfani da Suka Yi Rijista
sysadmin.users_desc: Sarrafa duk masu amfani da suka yi rijista da masu gudanarwa a duk tsarin Germinos.
sysadmin.user_updated_success: An sabunta mai amfani cikin nasara
sysadmin.no_users: Babu masu amfani da suka yi rijista a cikin tsarin.
sysadmin.groups_desc: Sarrafa dukkan rukunonin adana kudi masu aiki a cikin tsarin.
sysadmin.close_group_desc: Kana da tabbacin kana son rufe {{name}}? Mambobi ba za su iya yin gudunmawa ko raba kudi ba.
sysadmin.reactivate_group_desc: Kana da tabbacin kana son sake kunna {{name}}?
sysadmin.reset_admin_desc: Wannan zai samar da hanyar sake saita kalmar sirri ga {{name}} kuma ya fitar da su daga dukkan zaman shiga. Ka ci gaba?
sysadmin.cannot_reset_sysadmin: Ba za a iya sake saita Admin na Tsarin ba
sysadmin.cannot_reset_self: Ba za ka iya sake saita asusunka a nan ba
sysadmin.reset_failed: An kasa ƙirƙirar hanyar sake saita

reports.export_config: Sanya saitunanku na fitar da bayanai
reports.preview_failed: An kasa lodin dubawa. Har yanzu za ka iya sauke rahoton.
reports.invalid_date_range: Ranar farawa dole ta kasance kafin ranar gamawa
reports.preview_truncated: Ana nuna wasu layuka na farko kawai. Sauke cikakken rahoto don ganin duka bayanai.
reports.no_rows_match: Babu layi da ya dace da bincikenka.

admin_dashboard.member_status_tontine_desc: Abin da ake tsammani vs abin da aka biya a wannan lokaci
admin_dashboard.member_status_micro_desc: Ma'auni da shigowa/fita a wannan lokaci
admin_dashboard.insights_desc: Abin da aka tara a lokaci da rarrabawa
admin_dashboard.collected_over_time: Abin da aka tara a lokaci
admin_dashboard.paid_vs_outstanding: Abin da aka biya vs ragowa
admin_dashboard.no_recent_activity: Babu ayyuka na baya-bayan nan tukuna.
